competitors.name: Vocaroo
features: Quick recording and sharing via link
weaknesses: Editing is limited to basic crop
Files expire after a few months

competitors.name: Audiotool
weaknesses: Performance can be laggy in browser

competitors.name: TwistedWave Online
features: Direct integration with Google Drive & Dropbox
weaknesses: UI is functional but not intuitive for beginners
Free version is very limited (20-minute max)
Primarily an editor, not a seamless recorder-editor flow
No built-in noise reduction in online version

competitors.name: Apowersoft Free Online Audio Recorder
weaknesses: Feels more like a desktop app forced online

gaps.gap: Seamless, guided workflow from recording to polished edit
gaps.implementation: Build a linear, step-by-step interface: 1) Record (with real-time noise gate/level meter), 2) Auto-clean (AI noise reduction & mouth click removal), 3) Edit (intuitive cut, fade, silence removal tools), 4) Enhance (simple presets for 'Podcast', 'Voiceover', 'Interview'), 5) Export. Never let the user feel lost.

gaps.gap: Lack of AI-powered editing specifically for spoken word
gaps.implementation: Integrate specialized AI tools: 'Um/Uh' remover, breath sound reducer, auto-leveler for consistent volume, and a 'pacing' tool that highlights sections spoken too fast/slow. Differentiate from generic music DAWs.

gaps.gap: Poor collaboration and sharing for voice-based projects
gaps.implementation: Create a shareable project link that allows collaborators to: add timestamped comments (like Veed.io for video), suggest edits on the waveform, and export separate speaker tracks. Focus on podcasters, interviewers, and team voiceovers.

gaps.gap: No integrated transcription and text-based editing
gaps.implementation: Automatically generate a transcript upon recording. Allow users to edit the audio by deleting or rearranging text blocks. This is a game-changer for editing interviews and long-form content, bridging the gap between Descript and a simple online recorder.

Develop a true Progressive Web App (PWA) that functions like a native mobile app. Prioritize a touch-optimized interface for recording and basic editing on smartphones, with reliable save-to-cloud functionality.

recommended_positioning: The simplest way to record, clean up, and edit spoken audio online, powered by AI to make you sound professional in minutes.
